title: blanket impl Box<dyn AuthProvider> is a permanent API commitment
description: jmap-chat now exports impl AuthProvider for Box<dyn AuthProvider>. Any future addition of a method to AuthProvider will silently break this blanket impl and every caller that stores Box<dyn AuthProvider>. Additionally, JmapChatClient::new takes impl AuthProvider and immediately Box::new()-wraps it, so passing a Box<dyn AuthProvider> produces a double-boxed Box<Box<dyn AuthProvider>> — an invisible indirection bug that can confuse contributors tracing allocation.
